tests.name: Bot runs in sim and produces a valid score.json
tests.run: uv run python -m botkit.runner --config config.example.yaml --mode sim --journal-dir runs/ci --strategy strategies.baselines.delta_hedged_vol_seller:DeltaHedgedVolSeller --risk strategies.baselines.delta_hedged_vol_seller:HedgedRisk && uv run python score.py runs/ci && uv run python -c "import json; d=json.load(open('runs/ci/score.json')); req=['total_return','max_drawdown','sharpe','risk_adjusted','blew_up','score_0_3']; assert all(k in d for k in req), 'missing keys'; assert isinstance(d['blew_up'], bool); assert 0 <= d['score_0_3'] <= 3; print('SMOKE_OK score_0_3=' + str(d['score_0_3']))"
